headline: Intel Ties Governance And Culture To AI And Foundry Ambitions
summary: Intel (NasdaqGS:INTC) has appointed Aparna Bawa as Executive Vice President and Chief Legal & People Officer. Bawa will oversee Intel's global legal, ethics, compliance, people, and culture organizations, reporting directly to CEO Lip-Bu Tan. She joins from Zoom, bringing broad operational and legal experience during a period of ongoing transformation at Intel. Intel, trading at $65.17 per share, has recently experienced substantial share price momentum, with the stock up 28.3% over the...
